s-1.ptxt: INSTALL TIRE PRESSURE WARNING RECEIVER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector to the tire pressure warning receiver assembly.
Install the tire pressure warning receiver assembly with the bolt

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INNER ROOF SIDE GARNISH LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 5 clips and 2 claws, then install the roof side inner garnish LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEATBACK ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Place the seat back in the cabin.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the vehicle body.

s2.ptxt: Install the rear seat back assembly with the 4 bolts.
Pass the 3 seat belts through and close the cap of the 2 rear seat shoulder belt guides.
Install the floor anchor part with the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR CENTER SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Seat Type)
INSTALL REAR SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Seat Type)
INSTALL REAR SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Attach the 2 front hooks of the seat cushion to the vehicle body.
Confirm that the seat cushion is firmly installed.

atten3.ptxt: When installing the seat cushion, make sure the seat belt buckle is not under the seat cushion.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SIDE SEATBACK ASSEMBLY LH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the rear side seat back assembly with the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Attach the front hooks of the bench type rear seat cushion assembly to the vehicle body.
Confirm that the seat cushion is firmly installed.

atten3.ptxt: When installing the bench type rear seat cushion assembly, make sure that the seat belt buckle is not under the bench type rear seat cushion assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEATBACK ASSEMBLY LH (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the separate type rear seat back assembly LH with the 2bolts and 2 nuts.
Engage the 3 clamps and install the cover.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEATBACK COVER (for Reclining Seat Type)
INSTALL REAR SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Reclining Seat Type)
INSTALL BENCH TYPE REAR SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Attach the front hooks of the bench type rear seat cushion assembly to the vehicle body.
Confirm that the seat cushion is firmly installed.

atten3.ptxt: When installing the bench type rear seat cushion assembly, make sure that the seat belt buckle is not under the bench type rear seat cushion assembly.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT CABLE TO NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL
